attributes.action: Freeze MP and HOL wages & expenses until the US-Israel-Iran war ends completely
attributes.additional_details: This measure would ensure public money is not spent on parliamentary pay and expenses while the named international conflict continues. It would demonstrate accountability and link domestic fiscal responsibility to the resolution of global aggression. If this legislation is voted down, ALL public sector pay should be frozen, which would apply huge pressure to the government for either, them to suffer financially, or avoid responsiblity and let millions of citizens suffer even more.
attributes.background: The Government must introduce legislation that immediately freezes all pay, expenses and funding for MP’s & HOL until the conflict between US-Israel-Iran reaches a complete end — the end of ALL aggression, not peace deals or ceasefires. All public sector wages to be frozen if MP’s don’t vote “Yes”.

rejection.details:
We can't accept your petition because the UK Government and Parliament aren't responsible for the issue you raise. The Independent Parliamentary Standards Authority (IPSA) is responsible for deciding on MPs' expenses and pay. IPSA is independent of both Parliament and Government.

You can find out more about IPSA here: http://www.theipsa.org.uk
